overview.description: The Global X Dorsey Wright Thematic ETF (GXDW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dorsey Wright Thematic Rotation index. The fund is a passively managed fund-of-funds providing global equity exposure to disruptive-growth trends. Selection is based on a proprietary momentum-based methodology and initially weights the exposure equally. GXDW was launched on Oct 25, 2019 and is issued by Global X.
